sources.note: The ChatGPT prompt 'Does this relate at all to DEI? ... Begin with Yes or No' over ~1,100 pending NEH grant abstracts; DOGE staffer Justin Fox deposition; ~1,400 grants terminated in ~22 days, $100M+, staff could not define DEI under oath.
After the court ruling, NEH began asking recipients whether they want terminated awards reinstated (summer 2026).

The Alaska Native Language Center / Alaska Native Language Archive grant at UAF was flagged 'Yes' and terminated; ANLC founded 1972. Campus paper of record; single-source for the specific Alaska hook.
Judge Colleen McMahon ruled the mass NEH terminations unlawful, unconstitutional, ultra vires, and without legal effect (143-page decision). AHA v. NEH.
Alaska legislative hearing: linguists warn the Alaska Native Language Center's mission is at risk after the funding loss.
